tests.title: Topic Switch Detector — Clear Switch
tests.implemented: Lightweight LLM detector decides if child shifted interest to a fallback topic, replacing [SWITCH_TO] markers.
tests.scenario: Current topic: size | Child mentioned color in 2+ consecutive messages

params.prompt:
You are a topic-interest detector for a children's education conversation system.

Current topic: 大小 (id: size)
Fallback topics:
- color (颜色)
- shape (形状)
- texture (触感)

Conversation history:
assistant: 这个苹果好大呀！你觉得它和你的拳头比，谁更大呢？
user: 苹果更大
assistant: 对啦！苹果比你的拳头还大呢！
user: 它是什么颜色的呀？
assistant: 你注意到颜色了呀！这个苹果是红色的。你还见过什么红色的东西呢？
user: 我的书包也是红色的，还有我的红色蜡笔！

Child's latest input: 我的书包也是红色的，还有我的红色蜡笔！

Decide whether the child has clearly shifted interest to a fallback topic.
"Clearly shifted" means ONE of these:
- The child used 3+ words describing a fallback topic (e.g. "SO BIG! Bigger than my dog!")
- The child compared the object to something else using a fallback topic
- The child asked a direct question about a fallback topic
- The child returned to a fallback topic in 2+ consecutive messages

Output ONLY valid JSON (no markdown fences, no extra text):
{
   "should_switch": boolean,
   "target_attribute_id": string or null,
   "reason": "brief explanation"
}

tests.title: Topic Switch Detector — No Switch
tests.implemented: Detector returns false when child stays on current topic.
tests.scenario: Current topic: size | Child answers on-topic about size

params.prompt:

{

   "reason": "brief explanation"
}

tests.title: Topic Switch Detector — Casual Mention No Switch
tests.implemented: Detector is not oversensitive to single casual mentions.
tests.scenario: Current topic: size | Child casually mentions color once without depth

params.prompt:
You are a topic-interest detector for a children's education conversation system.

Current topic: 大小 (id: size)
Fallback topics:
- color (颜色)
- shape (形状)
- texture (触感)

Conversation history:
assistant: 这个苹果好大呀！你觉得它和你的拳头比，谁更大呢？

Child's latest input: 它是红色的，而且很大

Decide whether the child has clearly shifted interest to a fallback topic.
"Clearly shifted" means ONE of these:
- The child used 3+ words describing a fallback topic (e.g. "SO BIG! Bigger than my dog!")
- The child compared the object to something else using a fallback topic
- The child asked a direct question about a fallback topic
- The child returned to a fallback topic in 2+ consecutive messages

Output ONLY valid JSON (no markdown fences, no extra text):
{
   "should_switch": boolean,
   "target_attribute_id": string or null,
   "reason": "brief explanation"
}

tests.title: Attribute Response — No Switch, Quality Check
tests.implemented: Simplified ATTRIBUTE_RESPONSE_GUIDE replaces multi-topic guide, removes SWITCH_TO rules.
tests.scenario: Attribute lane, current topic color, child describes apple's color

messages.content: 我们来看这个苹果的颜色吧！

params.last_model_response: 我们来看这个苹果的颜色吧！
params.multi_topic_guide:
SENSORY SAFETY (applies to all sensory invitations):
- Default to sight: "What do you notice?", "Which part looks the biggest?", "Is it shiny or dull?"
- Allow imagination/guessing: "Do you think it would feel rough?", "If it rolled, would it go fast or slow?"
- Do NOT invite the child to TOUCH, SMELL, TASTE, LICK, or PHYSICALLY INTERACT with the object —
  the environment may be unsafe (parks, public spaces, unknown items).
- Do NOT use "Do you know…" framing — it creates testing pressure.
- For imitation: only voices and stretches/movements are OK ("Let's bark like a puppy!").
  NEVER suggest petting an animal, touching/smelling a plant, or any physical contact.

EXPLORATION DIRECTION: 颜色
ACTIVITY GOAL: 用彩色笔给苹果涂色

TRANSITION SIGNAL for [ACTIVITY_READY]:
1. one child-facing question
2. then on a new line: [ACTIVITY_READY]
3. then on a new line: REASON: <1-sentence with direct child quote>

ANTI-PATTERNS — NEVER produce these:
- "What 颜色 is it?" — quiz
- "Do you know what 颜色 it has?" — quiz with wrapper
- "What else can you tell me about it?" — too vague
- "Let us look at its 颜色!" — forced redirect
- "That is nice, but..." then question about 颜色 — ignoring child
- "Great! Now we can start an activity!" — mechanical announcement
- Adding [ACTIVITY_READY] after just one shallow exchange — premature handoff
- Switching topics on a single casual mention — too sensitive

tests.title: Attribute Response — After Switch, Natural Transition
tests.implemented: Topic switch applied BEFORE response generator; generator never sees old marker logic.
tests.scenario: Detector switched topic to shape. Response uses new profile.

messages.content: 我们来看看苹果的形状吧！

tests.title: Follow-up Question — Simplified Guide Quality
tests.implemented: Follow-up questions use simplified ATTRIBUTE_RESPONSE_GUIDE without SWITCH_TO rules.
tests.scenario: After attribute response, follow-up question with simplified guide

messages.content: 我们来看这个苹果的颜色吧！
对呀，这个苹果是红红的！像小太阳一样温暖呢。

tests.scenario: Attribute response for texture (high-risk for touch invitations)
